message:
test: rename inline tests with _batch2 suffix to avoid name collisions

Appends _batch2 suffix to 33 existing inline test functions across 12
core modules to prevent name collisions with tests generated in separate
batches by concurrent agent sessions. Purely mechanical rename — no
logic changes.

Modules affected: circuit_breaker (3), config (3), distributed (3),
error_codes (1), events (1), pool (7), session_topology (2),
sharding (3), storage (1), user_preferences (6), wezterm (2),
workflows (1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
